calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Nov-06-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, H. Nelson Meeks of the law offices of H. Nelson Meeks (415-989-9915) appears as counsel for defendant/judgment debtor/claimant

Rigoberto Hernandez Marquez (415-776-7138) appears as represented defendant/judgment debtor/claimant

No other appearance is made in this matter

Court inquires as to judgment debto's ability to pay. Court hears from counsel as set forth in the transcript of the official shorthand reporter.

The Claim of Exemption of Rigoberto Hernandez Marquez is approved/granted. The levying officer is directed to release any earnings held to the judgment debtor. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR No. 5976, e-mail: ssawyer@sftc.org. (L&M302)
